topics.title: Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals
topics.content:
> **Why This Gets You Hired:** Mastering Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals is a must-have for any cybersecurity role. SOC analysts use this daily, penetration testers build on it, and hiring managers specifically look for this skill on resumes.

:::objectives
- Compare major SIEM platforms
:::
topics.aiPrompt: Compare Splunk, Elastic, and Wazuh across cost, scalability, and features
topics.interviewQuestion: What are the three major SIEM platforms and their trade-offs?
topics.interviewAnswer: Splunk is enterprise-grade with powerful SPL but expensive. Elastic Stack (ELK) is open-source, scalable, and flexible. Wazuh is open-source with built-in IDS, FIM, and compliance mapping.

quiz.question: What is Splunk's main advantage?
What is Elastic Stack?
What is Wazuh?
options: Open-source SIEM with IDS and compliance

quiz.question: What deployment consideration is key?
options: On-prem vs cloud, ingest volume, retention

quiz.question: What was the bank's result switching to Wazuh?
Which best describes Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals is a foundational cybersecurity concept that defines how systems work. It is a security principle, not a programming language or protocol.

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: Security principles like those in Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals typically span confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

quiz.question: Where does Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals apply in real-world scenarios?
quiz.explanation: Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals concepts are universal across all security domains.

quiz.question: Which certification exam covers Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: Most major certifications touch on Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals at some level.

quiz.question: Best way to gain hands-on experience with Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: Practical application in a home lab is the most effective way to build skills. Reading alone is not enough.

quiz.question: Which skill is NOT directly related to Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: While web development may use security concepts, Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals is more directly tied to risk, response, and monitoring.

quiz.question: Scenario: You encounter Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals during a security audit. What is your first step?
quiz.explanation: A professional approach to Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals during an audit is to identify the issue and document findings for further analysis.

quiz.question: What is a common tool used with Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals?
quiz.explanation: Depending on context, Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals can involve firewalls, SIEMs, or packet analyzers.

quiz.question: Understanding Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals helps prevent which type of attack?
quiz.explanation: The specific attack Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals prevents depends on its context within the security domain.

quiz.question: How does Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals relate to the CIA triad?
quiz.explanation: Most security concepts including Day 1: SIEM Deployment Fundamentals can impact all three pillars of the CIA triad.

topics.title: Day 2: Splunk Architecture & Deployment
topics.content:
> **Why This Gets You Hired:** Mastering Day 2: Splunk Architecture & Deployment is a must-have for any cybersecurity role. SOC analysts use this daily, penetration testers build on it, and hiring managers specifically look for this skill on resumes.

:::objectives
- Learn Splunk\'s distributed architecture
:::
topics.aiPrompt: Draw a Splunk architecture diagram showing data flow
topics.interviewQuestion: What are the core components of Splunk's distributed architecture?
topics.interviewAnswer: Universal Forwarders collect and send logs. Indexers parse, store, and index data. Search Heads provide the query interface. Deployment Server manages forwarder configuration.

quiz.question: What does a Universal Forwarder do?
options: Collects and sends logs to Indexers

quiz.question: What does an Indexer do?
What does a Search Head do?
What is SPL?
What did the global retailer accomplish with Splunk?

topics.title: Day 3: Elastic Stack (ELK) Deployment
topics.description: Deploy and configure the Elastic Stack
topics.content:
> **Why This Gets You Hired:** Mastering Day 3: Elastic Stack (ELK) Deployment is a must-have for any cybersecurity role. SOC analysts use this daily, penetration testers build on it, and hiring managers specifically look for this skill on resumes.

:::objectives
- Deploy
- Configure the Elastic Stack
:::
topics.aiPrompt: Deploy Filebeat and Winlogbeat to send logs to Elasticsearch
topics.interviewQuestion: What are the core components of the Elastic Stack?
topics.interviewAnswer: Elasticsearch stores and indexes data. Logstash ingests and transforms logs. Kibana provides visualization. Beats are lightweight agents for shipping data. Elastic Security adds SIEM capabilities.

quiz.question: What does Elasticsearch do?
What does Logstash do?

topics.title: Day 4: Wazuh SIEM & XDR Deployment
topics.description: Deploy Wazuh for intrusion detection and compliance
topics.content:
> **Why This Gets You Hired:** Mastering Day 4: Wazuh SIEM & XDR Deployment is a must-have for any cybersecurity role. SOC analysts use this daily, penetration testers build on it, and hiring managers specifically look for this skill on resumes.

:::objectives
- Deploy Wazuh for intrusion detection
- Compliance
:::
topics.aiPrompt: Install Wazuh agent and configure custom detection rules
topics.interviewQuestion: What are Wazuh's key capabilities beyond SIEM?
topics.interviewAnswer: Wazuh provides rootkit detection, vulnerability detection, file integrity monitoring, container security, compliance scanning (PCI DSS, HIPAA, GDPR), and integrates with TheHive for case management.

quiz.question: What does Wazuh combine?
What runs on monitored endpoints?
What analyzes data on the manager?
What compliance framework did the agency map?
How much did audit prep reduce?

topics.title: Day 5: Log Ingestion & SIEM Tuning
topics.description: Master SIEM tuning and false positive reduction
topics.content:
> **Why This Gets You Hired:** Mastering Day 5: Log Ingestion & SIEM Tuning is a must-have for any cybersecurity role. SOC analysts use this daily, penetration testers build on it, and hiring managers specifically look for this skill on resumes.

:::objectives
- Master SIEM tuning
- False positive reduction
:::
topics.aiPrompt: Design a log ingestion plan and SIEM tuning strategy
topics.interviewQuestion: What is the SIEM tuning process?
topics.interviewAnswer: Identify all log sources, configure ingestion methods, normalize formats, then iteratively tune thresholds, create allowlists, and suppress known-good activity while measuring false positive reduction weekly.

quiz.question: What is the first step in log ingestion planning?
What happens after SIEM tuning?
What was the SOC's alert reduction after tuning?
What is an allowlist?
What is a tuning threshold?
